communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please provide any and all of the the following  that pertain to  the 2021-22, 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25, and/or 2025-26 academic years—

                    1.	Any and all records reflecting data bearing on students’ social, emotional, or psychological well-being, disaggregated by race/ethnicity where available, for the District as a whole and for each of the District’s high schools including—
                                    a.	Youth Truth Survey results;
                                    b.	California Healthy Kids Survey results (CHKS); and
                                     c.	 Any other Districtwide or school-site-specific surveys or measures.

                    2.	Any and all records reflecting annual and/or semi-annual academic data, disaggregated by race/ethnicity where available, for the District as a whole and for each of the District’s high schools including—
                                    a.	DFI Semester Grades;
                                    b.	Local Control and Accountability Plans (LCAP);
                                     c.	School Accountability Report Cards (SARC); and
                                    d.	Any other Districtwide or school-site-specific data that is or can be disaggregated by race.

                    3.	Any and all reports, records, and analyses created by, for, or at the direction of the District pertaining to any of the aforementioned data.

Where school-specific data is disaggregated by grade, please provide combined data for all grades as well where available; our goal with this request is to ensure that racial/ethnic groups whose numbers are too small to be reportable at the grade level will reach reportable numbers when all grade levels are included in the data for a given school year.

Please provide any raw data in excel or csv format.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tammy Edmonson
